hazards.name: Excessive compression
hazards.description: Hug bladder applies pressure above the labeled comfort limit, potentially causing transient pressure marks or restricted movement.

hazards.name: Skin irritation or pressure mark
hazards.description: Textile contact, seam placement, or prolonged use may contribute to skin redness, irritation, or pressure marking.

hazards.name: Alarm or release delay
hazards.description: Delayed alarm response or delayed hug release may prolong exposure to an unintended hug cycle.

hazards.name: Temperature discomfort
hazards.description: Localized warmth from the wrap or control unit tubing may cause discomfort or transient skin redness.
